'''Santhe Security''' was a subsidiary company of [[Santhe Corporation/Legends|Santhe Corporation]]. Santhe Security provided [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security forces]] for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] outposts and [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Santhe Security had its own force of military personnel, referred to as "Santhe Security troopers." They typically operated in [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of five to ten [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] and carried [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]], [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistols]], or [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]]. They were trained in [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]] and other types of melee combat as well as [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] operation and operation of vehicle [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].

Santhe Security personnel wore uniforms similar to that of the [[Imperial Fleet Regiment]], except they wore [[Color/Legends|silver]] helmets and had silver piping running down their shoulders, arms and legs. A simplified version of the Santhe logo was clearly visible on the back of the Santhe Security uniform.
